question: Will I qualify for at least one international olympiad?
textDescription:
This is my final chance

I will be attempting for two olympiads, MAYBE three, but most likely two. 

For some context:

-I have qualified once before and made the final selection three times

-1600 in the SAT (0.02% of all participants)

-Time management is my main weakness. Solving the problems is my main strength.

-The olympiads I am going for are not the "hardest ones" e.g. IMO. However, neither are they the easiest ones. 

I'm putting 1K liquidity on this market.

Update 2025-11-23 (PST) (AI summary of creator comment): Previous qualification details:

Qualified once in 2023-24

Made final selection three times over the past two years

Competition pool size: Approximately 1500-4000 participants, with 8 selected for each olympiad
